extension.description: BuilderForce AI coding agent — chat with a codebase-aware agent in your VS Code sidebar.
welcome.sessions:
Start a conversation with the BuilderForce Brain.
[New Chat](command:builderforce.newSession)

The Brain opens in the editor — the same unified chat as the web app, so you can review changes side by side.
welcome.insights:
Sign in to see live builder-level insights (token spend, budget, top model, cost per merged PR).
[Sign In](command:builderforce.signIn)
config.baseUrl.desc: Base URL of the BuilderForce gateway. The OpenAI-compatible endpoint `/llm/v1/chat/completions` is appended automatically. Override for self-hosted deployments.
config.webUrl.desc: Base URL of the BuilderForce web app (where embedded pages like the board live). Leave empty to derive it from `builderforce.baseUrl` (api.* → root domain).
config.defaultModel.desc: Default model id to use. Leave empty to let the gateway pick from the curated coding pool.
config.permissionMode.desc: How the agent applies changes to your workspace.
config.permissionMode.ask: Ask before applying each file edit or command (recommended).
config.permissionMode.acceptEdits: Apply file edits automatically without prompting.
